basic_details.job_title: ICDS Jashpur Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Integrated Child Development Services Jashpur (ICDS Jashpur)
basic_details.short_information: Integrated Child Development Services Jashpur (ICDS Jashpur) Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on 20-05-2026 on the official website. Have been announced through the ICDS Jashpur Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 44 years who have passed 8th Class are eligible to apply for these Anganwadi Helper vacancies. The online application process for ICDS Jashpur Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 has started on 20-05-2026 and will remain open until 04-06-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply online through the direct links

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 44 years Age Relaxation: 3 years relaxation for experienced Sahayika/Sangathika with 1 or more years of service.

selection_process: Merit List based on educational marks and additional points Document Verification Provisional Evaluation Sheet with claim-objection
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Integrated Child Development Services Jashpur Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Integrated Child Development Services Jashpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Anganwadi Helper post is 04 June 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Anganwadi Helper post is 8th Pass.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Anganwadi Helper post is between 18 years and 44 years. Age relaxation is applicable for experienced candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a merit list based on educational marks and additional points, followed by document verification and a provisional evaluation sheet with claim-objection.

faq.question: Q7. What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by ICDS Jashpur (Integrated Child Development Services Jashpur).

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from other states apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification does not explicitly mention restrictions for candidates from other states. However, it is always recommended to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
